column13: Estimated number of new residents expected to live in the completed development. It represents Net additional residential population introduced into the surrounding area.

Estimated percentage increase in local vehicle traffic attributable to this development. It represents Relative change in traffic volume compared to existing baseline conditions.Value of 2.5 means a projected 2.5% increase in traffic.
Relative increase in environmental load generated by the project.

Relative impact of building height and massing on surrounding sunlight exposure. It represents a potential reduction in daylight access to nearby properties and public spaces.Higher values indicate greater potential shadow obstruction

Relative pressure the development places on nearby public transit infrastructure. It represents increased transit demand due to new residents or users.Higher values indicate more strain on transit capacity.
Estimated number of additional daily public transit riders generated by the project. It represents the expected average daily increase in transit usage. Unit: riders per day
